anti_patterns_observed: discount-first content with no cultural storytelling
foreign cuisine heritage featured as aspirational (Italian crust)

no occasion-tied content (no Ramadan warmth, no national day integration)

no warmth hospitality cues (no كرم الضيافة, no majlis references)
football/sports content is local but not specifically Najdi/cultural
discount mechanics identical to global McDonald's playbook
